subtasks.description: Retrieve all active billing contracts with contracted annual value from MongoDB contract management system
Query invoices issued in 2024, grouped by contract ID with total billed amount and count, to compute actual spend per contract

Reconcile contracted annual values from MongoDB against 2024 actual invoiced amounts from SQL; calculate variance percentage, identify material variances (>10%), and classify contract status (in-line, over-billed, under-billed)

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks (minimum): (1) mongo_query (small) retrieves active contracts with annual value—straightforward collection query; (2) sql_gen (small) aggregates 2024 invoices by contract—simple GROUP BY on date range; (3) cross_recon (mid) reconciles the two sources, calculates variance percentages, and flags material variances >10%—mid tier because it involves multi-source reconciliation, numeric comparison logic, and classification output. No policy_action needed (variance thresholding is a reporting rule, not a governance policy). No multitool_plan needed (data sourcing is localized to two known systems).

output.sql: SELECT i.contract_id, COUNT(*) as invoice_count, SUM(i.amount_usd) as total_billed_amount FROM invoice_facts i WHERE i.invoice_date >= '2024-01-01' AND i.invoice_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY i.contract_id ORDER BY i.contract_id

classification_logic.no_sql_match: contract in mongo but not in sql results

output.join_semantics: LEFT JOIN on contract_id (MongoDB left, SQL right)
output.note: Execute MongoDB pipeline first, then SQL query, then perform row-by-row reconciliation with null/0 substitution for unmatched SQL records
